domain_context: Mobile Web App / React Native Expo Style Audio Player

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Bento 'Control Room' for dashboards, wide vertical lists for episodes
spacing_and_layout.bottom_nav: Fixed bottom, crystal glass surface (backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60) with 1px top border (border-white/10)
spacing_and_layout.now_playing_modal: Full screen overlay using pure glassmorphism over blurred album art. Massive album art presence with nested radii.

surface_strategies.cards: Flat background (surface_elevated), 1px subtle border (border-white/10), no drop shadow. Hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1)
surface_strategies.headers_nav: Glassmorphism (The 'Crystal' Variant) - backdrop-blur-2xl bg-[#05050A]/70, 1px inner stroke.
surface_strategies.buttons: Neumorphic tactile or solid accent. No pure black.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: ALWAYS explicitly set text color on hover. Slight scaling for album art on press.
motion_and_interactions.now_playing_transition: Slide up from bottom for mini-player expansion to full screen.

icons_and_assets.style: Duotone weight for marketing/premium feel, regular for standard UI

default_album_art.description: Abstract colorful lights, used as fallback for missing podcast cover art

empty_state_library.description: Black studio microphone, used for empty states in library or search

component_instructions.tabs: Override Shadcn fixed heights. Use h-auto. Add generous padding.
component_instructions.audio_player_slider: Use Shadcn slider, customize track with primary_accent. Thicker track on mobile for thumb usability.
component_instructions.episode_list: Use wide gap-4 vertical lists. Never center-align episode descriptions. Left align.
component_instructions.buttons: Use data-testid for all interactive elements. Example: data-testid='play-pause-button'.

instructions_to_main_agent: This is a mobile web app acting as a podcast player. Ensure it looks native.
Use a bottom fixed tab bar for navigation (Library, Search, Downloads).
Implement a Mini-Player that floats just above the bottom tab bar when audio is active.
Clicking the Mini-Player should expand into a full-screen Now Playing view.
Avoid using generic Vercel/Stripe looks. Lean into the dark, cinematic 'Jewel & Luxury' archetype.
Ensure the Now Playing screen uses a blurred version of the album art as its background with a dark overlay.
Use @phosphor-icons/react for all iconography to maintain a premium feel.
For the audio player, ensure Play/Pause, Seek 30s Forward/Back, and playback speed buttons are prominent and thumb-sized.
Do not use transparent headers without blur. Apply 'Crystal Glass' rules.
